headline: $1000 Invested In TJX Companies 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
summary: TJX Companies (NYSE:TJX) has outperformed the market over the past 20 years by 8.29% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 17.55%. Currently, TJX Companies has a market capitalization of $167.40

headline: Jim Cramer Calls TJX 'a Buy' as an 'Inventory Play,' Says Walmart Seems 'Cheap'
summary: Jim Cramer calls TJX a buy for its "inventory play" status, but says Walmart (WMT) seems "cheap" amid shifting retail sales and stock dips.
